# Kasanely

> Static, no-build visual comparison tool for web pages.

Kasanely is a Japanese, client-side HTML tool for comparing two web pages by URL. It is designed for checking visual differences between an existing page and a target page without a build step or server-side dependency.

## Key Features

- Side-by-side comparison of two web pages.
- Overlay comparison with onion, swipe, and difference modes.
- Full-page iframe display for long pages.
- Vertical position adjustment for each page.
- Horizontal position adjustment for the target page.
- Basic authentication URL support by generating `https://user:pass@example.com/` style URLs in the browser.
- Static deployment: open `index.html` directly or host the `static` directory as-is.

## Important Limits

- Kasanely runs entirely in the browser and cannot attach arbitrary `Authorization` headers to iframes.
- Sites that block iframe embedding with `X-Frame-Options` or `Content-Security-Policy` cannot be previewed by a static-only tool.
- Basic authentication credentials are embedded in the iframe URL while loading and should only be used in trusted environments.

## Primary Files

- [Application](./index.html): Main static HTML app.
- [Styles](./styles.css): Visual layout and responsive behavior.
- [Behavior](./app.js): URL handling, comparison modes, reload behavior, and position adjustment.
